title: piscaria
intro: Piscaria is a genus of flowering plants in the family Cornaceae, native to Europe and Asia, commonly known as water gladiolus. The medicinal properties of Piscaria include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Piscaria include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Piscaria include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
